title: 10 best herbal teas for osteoarthritis
intro_desc: Herbal teas for osteoarthritis are a natural remedy that helps alleviate the symptoms of this chronic condition by reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving joint mobility. The best herbal teas for osteoarthritis include Curcuma longa, Zingiber officinale, Glycyrrhiza glabra, Equisetum arvense, Rheum palmatum, Ginkgo biloba, Achillea millefolium, Vaccinium myrtillus, Cinchona officinalis, and Boswellia serrata. If left untreated, osteoarthritis can severely limit daily activities, causing chronic pain, stiffness, and limited mobility, ultimately affecting one's quality of life, independence, and overall well-being.
